description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set on a rectangular plot with a green lawn surrounding it. The structure features a flat roof and a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a predominantly white and black exterior. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the sides, allowing for ample natural light inside. A red car is parked in a designated area adjacent to the building, suggesting the presence of a garage or carport. The interior layout is visible from above, revealing multiple rooms and open spaces, with clear demarcations for living, dining, and private areas. The building sits on a slightly raised platform, with a brown pathway or driveway leading up to the entrance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, white and black exterior, large asymmetrical windows, and a visible red car parked beside it.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full interior layout, green lawn, and a red car parked next to the building.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the black exterior wall, brown pathway, and the flat roof profile.
description_view_2: Rear view with the red car and asymmetrical window arrangement visible, along with the expansive green lawn.
description_view_3: Front view showing the main entrance, brown pathway, and the arrangement of windows and doors.
